Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Continued To Apr-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Casimir Wilson for James Johnson.

Mr. Wilson stated that he sent letters to the three Beneficiaries, that there was no response and that he had no contact from Mr. Lewis. In addition, he stated that the proceeds from the sale of the property in the amount of $76,000.00 were deposited into a Credit Union in Oakland, that someone needs to be appointed, that there is one known Creditor that has not been paid, that he does not know what happened to his Client and that he has no information as to whether the funds have been distributed to anyone. The Court stated that it was concerned that are other Beneficiaries and creditors. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Continued To Jan-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Casimir Wilson for James Johnson.

The Court stated that there was concern that there are other Heirs, that it would issue an Order to Appear to the Personal Representative and that it would continue the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel. Mr. Wilson stated that he does not know where Mr. Johnson is, and that he will communicate with Douglas and Raymond to see if they could obtain a current address. The matter was continued to January 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear will be sent to the last known address.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
